title: Labels and Values
knowledge_note: Muslim scholars kept detailed records called diwan. A notebook in ILMA is a digital record book — information stored with labels.
explanation: A 'notebook' stores values with named labels. You can add any information and look it up by its label later.
starter_code:
remember student = notebook[name: "Amira", age: 12, grade: "A"]
say student[name]
say student[grade]
worked_example:
remember student = notebook[name: "Amira", age: 12, grade: "A"]
say student[name]
say student[grade]
challenge: Add a "subject" key and say it.
hint: Add subject: "Maths" to the notebook, then say student[subject].
